title: Expanded Horizons: Lite
description: Expanded Horizons: Lite leverages Vulkan rendering for low-end PCs while retaining all gameplay of the original Expanded Horizons. Optimized graphics and full cross-compatibility ensure smooth fun!
body:
# 🌍 Expanded Horizons: Lite ⚡

🛠 **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.1  
🔧 **Mod Loader:** Fabric

## ✨ Overview

**Expanded Horizons: Lite** is a streamlined variant of the original [**Expanded Horizons**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/expanded_horizons) modpack, designed specifically for low-end PCs. By harnessing Vulkan rendering, this version cuts down on graphic intensity while keeping the same engaging gameplay. Enjoy the same breathtaking landscapes, villages, and mechanics—only optimized for smoother performance on modest hardware. Plus, it's fully compatible with the original, so you can easily play with friends no matter which version they use! 🚀🎮

## 🌟 Features

- 🔥 **Vulkan-Powered Rendering:** Enhanced performance on weak systems with advanced Vulkan tech.
- 🌍 **Identical Gameplay:** All the immersive content of the original mod pack remains intact.
- 🎨 **Optimized Graphics:** Reduced graphic settings for smoother performance without losing the vanilla charm.
- 🤝 **Cross-Compatible:** Play seamlessly with friends using the original Expanded Horizons mod pack!
